scripts.test:ci: pnpm -w bundle && pnpm --filter @roo-code/vscode-webview build && pnpm test:run
scripts.test:ci:mock: pnpm -w bundle && pnpm --filter @roo-code/vscode-webview build && USE_MOCK=true pnpm test:run
scripts.test:run: rimraf out && tsc -p tsconfig.json && npx dotenvx run -f .env.local -- node ./out/runTest.js
